name: Delicious Rendezvous
overview: Baek Jong Won is here again to help out an industry. This time, he goes all out to promote local food. He visits various regions and learn about their local produce. By creating different meals with these ingredients, Mr. Baek is able to sell them in rest stops. Yang Se Hyeong, Kim Hee Chul, and Kim Dong Jin are here to assist.

trailers.title: [맛남의 광장] 예고 '추석특집! 백종원과 함께하는 지역 농산물 살리기 프로젝트' / Preview | SBS NOW
